parsed_review.summary: CP00-859 (RP28 Marketplace descriptor-only fixture security/test tail, RP28.P05.M03.S09-S18, risk A, 10 units) is internally consistent and its descriptor-layer production_ready_flag (marketplace_fixture_security_test_tail_descriptor_verified) is supported by read-only inspection. Implementation: MARKETPLACE_CP859_PACK_BINDING (range, upstream CP00-858, next CP00-860, gates H28/C28) and MARKETPLACE_CP859_REQUIREMENTS deliverable_counts (impl:3, security_audit:2, fixture:1, test:3, hermes_evidence:1) match the baseline; required_section_rows = FIXTURE_ROWS.slice(8,18) maps exactly to the 10 unit titles (Cross-tenant, Missing context, Audit hint, Security trimming, AI retrieval/analytics, Fixture manifest, Golden test, Failure test, Hermes fixture evidence, Claude missing-test prompt). createRow seeds every row with descriptor_only:true, runtime_execution:false and all *_executed/*_written/*_included flags false; the 10 CP859 ROW_EXTRAS only reinforce safe values (security_trimming_case: unauthorized_data_omission true + permission_decision_detail_included false; ai_retrieval_or_analytics_case: custom_ai_app_runtime_executed false + prompt_or_completion_payload_included false; cross_tenant_case: cross_tenant_install_allowed false). Validators (coverage/descriptor/contract) enforce distribution, descriptor-only, no runtime open, no secrets/OAuth/prompt payloads, no real data/permission detail/audit body, no product-state write, authority boundary (claude_is_final_approval false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust false, human approval required), Hermes packet emits_runtime_receipt false, and read-only Claude packet. Tests (model.test.js) cover CP859 binding/coverage, runtime-closed descriptor (row_count 10), and contract projection currency. Generated contract (schema v0.1, latest_pack CP00-859, latest_projection MarketplaceCp859FixtureSecurityTestDescriptor, validation.valid true, no_write_attestation all-false) matches the registry; README documents the pack; live plan cursor (next_subphase RP28.P05.M03.S09) equals the first unit. Boundaries hold: manifest production_ready/runtime_ready false, implementation_layer descriptor, no_real_data true. CP178+ hardening verified working: prior attempt-01 (status 143, 0-byte stdout) and attempt-02 (status 1, API ConnectionRefused) were both correctly marked invalid_review / closeout_eligible false. Claude stays a read-only independent reviewer (not final approver); Hermes patterns are used only for deterministic review-packet/evidence descriptors (no product runtime). No P0/P1/P2 issues; one P3 bookkeeping note that does not affect closeout.

findings.title: Manifest/inspection invalid_review_attempts arrays empty despite two recorded invalid review-receipt artifacts
findings.details: manifest.pack_level_claude_review.invalid_review_attempts and construction-inspection.json invalid_review_attempts are both [], but two invalid review attempts exist on disk: artifacts/closeout-pack-claude-review/cp00-859/review-receipt-invalid-attempt-01.json (status 143, 0-byte stdout; invalid_reason 'stdout_0_bytes; required_field_error: parsed_review missing') and review-receipt-invalid-attempt-02.json (status 1, API ConnectionRefused; invalid_reason 'auth_or_cli_error; structured_output_missing'). The hardening correctly rejected both (valid_review false, closeout_eligible false), so the audit trail is intact in the artifacts directory; only the manifest/inspection summary arrays are not yet populated. This is pre-finalization state and does not affect the descriptor-only production_ready claim, the no-write/no-real-data boundaries, or the authority boundary.
findings.recommendation: When the valid review receipt is normalized, reconcile manifest.pack_level_claude_review.invalid_review_attempts and construction-inspection.json invalid_review_attempts to reference the two recorded invalid attempts so the on-manifest audit trail matches the artifacts directory.
findings.post_review_disposition: Non-blocking; expected to reconcile at receipt normalization when the valid review is recorded. Does not block pack or goal closeout.
